titles.text: Tantei Jinguji Saburo: Yume no Owari ni
探偵 神宮寺三郎 夢の終わりに

descriptions.text: The first game in the Jinguuji Saburo series was released on the NES in 1987. The series told the different cases of a 32 years old detective named Saburo Jinguuji out to solve deadly crimes, that is supported by a cast which includes his assistant Yoko Misoni and local police inspector Sanzo Kumano.

In this game, Jingūji is tormented by hideous dreams of his past in New York. One day, he helped Nagata Yuka, a high-school friend of his assistant Yōko Misono, to solve the stalker problem. After he thought that he had already solved this case successfully, Nagata vanished. At the same time, a series of women missing cases were happening.
